case_title: IN RE: AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH INSURANCE

docket_entries.description: NTC OF MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH INSURANCE EXCHANGE HEARING SET FOR DEC-12-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-12-2012 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER COMPELLING CLAIMANT'S ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES

AMENDED FACE SHEET WITH PROOF OF SERVICE ON PETITIONER AAA NCNU, IE'S ORDER COMPELLING CLAIMANT'S ANSWERS TO INTEROGATORIES FILED BY PETITIONER AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH INSURANCE EXCHANGE
PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION FILED BY PETITIONER AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH INSURANCE EXCHANGE AS TO RESPONDENT SAAD, BAT-EL
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-12-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH INSURANCE MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS WAIVED ALL OBJECTIONS BY FAILING TO TIMELY RESPOND TO THE DISCOVERY PROPOUNDED. WITHIN 15 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE ON DEFENDANT VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES - GENERAL, SET ONE. SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. THE DECLARATION OF COUNSEL DOES NOT SUFFICIENTLY SEGREGATE THE HOURS ACTUALLY SPENT ON PREPARING THE MOTION FROM THE TIME DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL ANTICIPATES SPENDING IN APPEARING AT THE HEARING. ORDER SIGNED. ERNST HALPERIN, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH INSURANCE'S Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories will be heard at 9:00am on the discovery calendar. Judge: Marla Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Robert L. Anderson, Law Offices of MacMorris & Carbone, 510.267.7253, appearing for the Petitioner;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Ruling: the tentative ruling is adopted as follows: AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH INSURANCE Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories is GRANTED. Plaintiff has waived all objections by failing to timely respond to the discovery propounded. Within 15 days of entry of this order Plaintiff shall serve on Defendant verified code compliant responses to Defendant's Form Interrogatories - General, Set One. Sanctions are DENIED. The declaration of counsel does not sufficiently segregate the hours actually spent on preparing the motion from the time Defendant's counsel anticipates spending in appearing at the hearing. Order signed. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
